title: Qwen-Audio-3.0-Realtime: A Field Guide for Voice Agents

pages.title: Demo Evaluation Checklist (Conversation)
pages.kicker: Rate these dimensions to gauge real-world readiness.

cards.title: First Audio Latency
cards.body: Does the first audio arrive fast enough for a natural conversational flow?

cards.title: Interruption Speed
cards.body: Does playback stop instantly when the user interrupts, or does it bleed over?

cards.title: Filler Handling
cards.body: Does smart_turn ignore “uh,” “um,” and pauses without triggering false turn completions?

cards.title: Command Revision
cards.body: Can the agent gracefully recover when the user revises or restates a command mid-turn?

pages.title: The Application Owns Authority
pages.kicker: Function Calling makes the model useful, but it does not make model intent trustworthy by default.

cards.title: Model intent
cards.body: Treat function-call arguments as a proposal from uncertain audio.

cards.title: Schema validation
cards.body: Reject malformed, missing, stale, or out-of-policy arguments.

cards.title: Confirmation
cards.body: Require explicit approval before consequential external actions.

cards.title: Audit trail
cards.body: Store events, tool results, cancellations, and latency traces.
